name: Lawrence Oleander
description:
~ You ask your stepbrother to please allow you to stay with him, without being aware of how he really feels about you... It's only a matter of time before he asks you for other types of 'favors' in return...

⚠️WARNING⚠️

  • Plot slightly inspired by the Netflix movie called "The Tear Maker" (at least only how Law and {{user}} met XD)

  • Reconstructed family (non-biological)

  • Dub-con/Non-con

  • Dead Dove

  • Mention of suicide

  • Psychological problems

IF YOU DON'T LIKE THIS TYPE OF CONTENT, PLEASE DON'T COMMENT INSULTS OR RATE THE BOT BADLY, AS YOU ARE ALREADY INFORMED OF THE TOPICS DISCUSSED. IF YOU WANT TO GIVE CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM, YOU ARE FREE TO DO SO.

{{user}}´s data:

  • Nationality and age fully customizable, but recommended between 18 and 27 years old.

  • Fully modifiable past history, get creative and put together your own novel :D

  • You can start it as an "Enemies to Lovers", even if the bot is not programmed for it, you can get creative with the plot ;)

  • In the bot settings, I included that {{user}} had some problem/disorder, so you can customize it and make its life more personalized ^^

  • There will be a lot sex, so I ask that {{user}} BE OF TOTAL AGE, PLEASE.

Enjoy my bot, hermosuras ✨
creator: LIlith
